raw_text:
ObserveStack Systems // Junior Site Reliability Engineer

San Francisco, CA (Hybrid) | Full-time | $85,000 - $105,000 per year

Making distributed systems reliable and visible for every engineering team

>> ABOUT

ObserveStack Systems is a growing cloud infrastructure company focused on providing
observability and reliability solutions for distributed systems. We help engineering

teams understand and optimize their infrastructure through intelligent monitoring,
tracing, and incident management tools. Founded in 2021, we're building the next

generation of SRE tooling for the modern cloud-native world.

>> SUMMARY

ObserveStack Systems is hiring a Junior Site Reliability Engineer to join our

Infrastructure team. In this role, you'll work on building and maintaining reliable
systems at scale, learning best practices in monitoring, incident response, and

infrastructure automation. You'll collaborate with senior engineers to improve our
platform's stability, troubleshoot production issues, and contribute to our observability

infrastructure. This is an excellent opportunity to grow your SRE skills and make a
direct impact on how thousands of teams monitor their applications.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Monitor and maintain observability infrastructure using Prometheus and Grafana,
learning to set up alerts and dashboards for key metrics

- Assist in incident response activities, documenting post-mortems and contributing to
root cause analysis under senior engineer guidance

- Write automation scripts in Python to perform operational tasks and reduce manual
toil

- Help maintain Kubernetes clusters by troubleshooting pod deployments, networking
issues, and resource constraints

- Implement and test SLOs/SLIs for critical services, learning how to define
meaningful reliability targets

- Contribute to distributed tracing setup and troubleshooting using tools like Jaeger
or Zipkin

- Participate in on-call rotation (with shadow support) and handle escalations from
monitoring systems

- Review infrastructure-as-code and automation improvements, providing feedback and
learning from code reviews

>> MUST HAVE

- 0-2 years of professional software engineering or operations experience
- Strong foundational knowledge of Linux/Unix systems and shell scripting

- Familiarity with at least one programming language (Python, Go, or similar)
- Understanding of basic networking concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP)

- Demonstrated experience with version control systems (Git)
- Willingness to participate in on-call rotations and learn incident response

practices

>> NICE TO HAVE

 - Experience or coursework with Docker and container technologies

- Exposure to Kubernetes or other container orchestration platforms
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

- Prior experience with monitoring tools like Prometheus or similar

>> STACK

Kubernetes / Prometheus / Grafana / Python / Go / Jaeger (Distributed Tracing) / Docker /
Terraform / Linux/systemd / PagerDuty

>> BENEFITS

- Competitive health, dental, and vision insurance (company covers 80% of premiums)

- 401(k) matching up to 4% of salary
- $2,000 annual professional development budget for courses, conferences, and

certifications
- Flexible work-from-home policy with collaborative office space

- Unlimited PTO with a minimum of 15 days encouraged per year
- Free lunch and beverages in office, monthly team events

- Learning opportunities through mentorship from senior SRE engineers

>> APPLY

To apply, please submit your resume, a cover letter explaining your interest in SRE, and

a GitHub profile or portfolio link (if available) to careers@observestack.com with the
subject line 'Junior SRE Application'. You can also apply directly through our careers

page at observestack.com/careers. We review applications on a rolling basis.
